name: Standard AVB Financial Corp.
summary: Standard AVB Financial Corp. operates as a bank holding company for Standard Bank PaSB that provides financial services to individuals, families, and businesses. It offers various deposit accounts, including savings accounts, certificates of deposit, money market accounts, commercial and regular checking accounts, and individual retirement accounts. The company also provides commercial real estate loans, commercial business loans, one- to four-family residential mortgage loans, home equity loans and lines of credit, construction loans, and consumer loans and overdraft lines of credit; and investment securities, as well as offers mobile and online banking, remote check deposit, positive pay, People Pay, remote deposit capture, and automated teller machine services. It operates through a network of seventeen banking offices located in the Allegheny, Westmoreland, and Bedford counties, Pennsylvania; and Allegany County, Maryland. The company was formerly known as Standard Financial Corp. and changed its name to Standard AVB Financial Corp. in April 2017. Standard AVB Financial Corp. was founded in 1913 and is headquartered in Monroeville, Pennsylvania.
